ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each plant species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "functional_group_index" INTEGER /* Index representing the functional group of the species */,
  "nitrogen_fixer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the species is a nitrogen fixer */,
  "gdd_minimum" INTEGER /* Minimum growing degree days required for the species */,
  "gdd_maximum" INTEGER /* Maximum growing degree days the species can tolerate */,
  "min_january_t" INTEGER /* Minimum January temperature that the species can withstand */,
  "max_drought" REAL /* Maximum drought tolerance for the species */,
  "leaf_longevity" INTEGER /* Leaf longevity in years */,
  "epicormic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the species can produce epicormic shoots */,
  "leaf_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in leaves */,
  "fine_root_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in fine roots */,
  "wood_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in wood */,
  "coarse_root_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in coarse roots */,
  "leaf_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in leaves */,
  "fine_root_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in fine roots */,
  "wood_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in wood */,
  "coarse_root_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in coarse roots */,
  "foliage_litter_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in foliage litter */,
  "maximum_anpp" REAL /* Maximum above-net primary productivity (ANPP) in g/m^2 */,
  "maximum_biomass" INTEGER /* Maximum biomass in g/m^2 */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "litter_decomposition_rate" REAL /* Litter decomposition rate */,
  "carbon_sequestration_rate" REAL /* Carbon sequestration rate */,
  "ecosystem_role" TEXT /* Ecosystem role of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_functional_group_index FOREIGN KEY ("functional_group_index") REFERENCES functional_groups ("functional_group_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_groups" (
  "functional_group_index" INTEGER /* Unique index for the functional group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional group */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem where the functional group is typically found */,
  "role_in_ecosystem" TEXT /* Role of the functional group in the ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_group_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait (e.g., Leaf Lignin, Maximum ANPP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the trait */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or source for the trait data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drought_tolerance" (
  "drought_index" INTEGER /* Unique index for drought tolerance entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "drought_rating" REAL /* Drought tolerance rating (0 to 1 where 1 is very tolerant) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure drought tolerance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the drought tolerance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drought_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drought_tolerance_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the condition entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature for growth */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature for growth */,
  "optimal_gdd" INTEGER /* Optimal growing degree days for the species */,
  "optimal_soil_ph" REAL /* Optimal soil pH for the species */,
  "optimal_soil_type" TEXT /* Optimal soil type for the species */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* Water requirements of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_conditions_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaf_characteristics" (
  "leaf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for leaf characteristic entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "leaf_longevity" REAL /* Average longevity of leaves in years */,
  "leaf_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in leaves */,
  "leaf_size" REAL /* Average size of leaves in cm^2 */,
  "leaf_shape" TEXT /* Typical shape of leaves */,
  "leaf_color" TEXT /* Typical color of leaves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaf_characteristics_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_characteristics" (
  "root_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for root characteristic entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "fine_root_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in fine roots */,
  "wood_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in wood */,
  "coarse_root_lignin" REAL /* Lignin content in coarse roots */,
  "root_depth" REAL /* Typical root depth in meters */,
  "root_type" TEXT /* Type of roots (e.g., fibrous, taproot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_characteristics_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cn_ratios" (
  "cn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for CN ratio entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "leaf_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in leaves */,
  "fine_root_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in fine roots */,
  "wood_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in wood */,
  "coarse_root_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in coarse roots */,
  "foliage_litter_cn" INTEGER /* Carbon to nitrogen ratio in foliage litter */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure CN ratios */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the CN ratio data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cn_ratios_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "productivity" (
  "productivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for productivity entry */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Reference to the species code */,
  "maximum_anpp" INTEGER /* Maximum above-net primary productivity (ANPP) in g/m^2 */,
  "maximum_biomass" INTEGER /* Maximum biomass in g/m^2 */,
  "measurement_period" TEXT /* Period over which productivity was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure productivity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the productivity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productivity_species_code FOREIGN KEY ("species_code") REFERENCES species ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is part of */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
